guild_adventurers.name: Kaelen
guild_adventurers.dailyRoutine: Practices swordsmanship and guards the guild entrance
guild_adventurers.questFunctions: Frontline tank, vanguard engagement, physical damage
guild_adventurers.relationship: Good friends with Elara, respects Magnus

guild_adventurers.name: Ruen
guild_adventurers.dailyRoutine: Scouts dangerous areas and checks traps
guild_adventurers.relationship: Works silently with Nyx, often avoids Van

guild_adventurers.name: Gavin
guild_adventurers.dailyRoutine: Patrols the guild borders and checks wind conditions

guild_adventurers.name: Magnus
guild_adventurers.dailyRoutine: Coaches young adventurers and maintains heavy gear
guild_adventurers.questFunctions: Main defensive shield, crowd control, divine protection
guild_adventurers.relationship: Acts like a mentor to Kaelen and Elara

guild_adventurers.name: Silas
guild_adventurers.dailyRoutine: Studies old magic scrolls in the laboratory
guild_adventurers.questFunctions: Heavy area-of-effect magic, elemental control, ritual spellcasting
guild_adventurers.relationship: Often seen exchanging rare books with Yuri

guild_adventurers.name: Elara
guild_adventurers.dailyRoutine: Runs drills and inspects defensive equipment
guild_adventurers.questFunctions: Frontline protection, tactical leading, sword combat
guild_adventurers.relationship: Trains with Kaelen, deeply respects Magnus

guild_adventurers.name: Nyx
guild_adventurers.personality: Cunning, quiet, calculating, ruthless to enemies
guild_adventurers.dialogueStyle: Cold, short, and to the point
guild_adventurers.dailyRoutine: Inspects her cross-bow and tests new poison mixtures
guild_adventurers.questFunctions: High burst damage, single-target elimination, stealth
guild_adventurers.relationship: Keeps a professional distance, coordinates with Ruen

guild_adventurers.name: Sera
guild_adventurers.dailyRoutine: Tends to the guild's garden and treats injured animal companions
guild_adventurers.questFunctions: Nature-based healing, crowd control, beast summoning
guild_adventurers.relationship: Friendly with Gavin, shares herbal knowledge with Serena

guild_adventurers.name: Gaia
guild_adventurers.dailyRoutine: Draws new maps and packages exploration gear
guild_adventurers.questFunctions: Resource gathering, navigation, hidden path discovery
guild_adventurers.relationship: Always asking Ivy for bounty leads and map details

guild_adventurers.name: Isola
guild_adventurers.dailyRoutine: Blesses outgoing adventurers and manages the infirmary
guild_adventurers.questFunctions: Divine healing, status purification, holy magic buffs
guild_adventurers.relationship: Works alongside Finn to document successful heals and recovery
